{ "name": "erusev/parsedown", "description": "Parser for Markdown.", "keywords": ["markdown", "parser"], "homepage": "http://parsedown.org", "type": "library", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Emanuil Rusev", "email": "hello@erusev.com", "homepage": "http://erusev.com" } ], "require": { "php": ">=5.3.0", "ext-mbstring": "*" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^4.8.35" }, "autoload": { "psr-0": {"Parsedown": ""} }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-0": { "TestParsedown": "test/", "ParsedownTest": "test/", "CommonMarkTest": "test/", "CommonMarkTestWeak": "test/" } } }
